Catalog.description: The full catalog produced by `skillzkit catalog`. The JSON Schema generated from this type is the cross-language contract — TS consumers import these types directly; Java consumers read the generated schema and produce POJOs.

packageVersion.description: Semver of the skillzkit package that produced this catalog.

version.description: Catalog format version. Incremented on breaking shape changes.

allowedTools.description: Tool names the command is allowed to invoke, e.g. `["Bash", "Read", "Edit"]`.

argumentHint.description: Free-form hint shown in CLI help, e.g. `"<package-name>"`.

body.description: Full markdown body of the source `.md` file (no frontmatter).

dependents.description: Inverse of `dependsOn`. Computed at catalog-build time.

dependsOn.description: Command slugs that must run first — those whose `produces` satisfy this command's `requires`. Computed at catalog-build time; a topological sort over this edge set yields build order.

outcome.description: Imperative action-phrase describing what this command produces. UI prefers this over slug; falls back to slug when absent.

produces.description: Artifact paths/globs this command creates, declared in frontmatter (e.g. `["design/foundations/*.pen"]`). A command B `dependsOn` A when one of A's `produces` satisfies one of B's `requires`.

referencedBy.description: Inverse of `references`. Computed at catalog-build time.

references.description: Slash-command slugs referenced in this item's body. Computed at catalog-build time.

requires.description: Artifact paths/globs this command needs to exist before it runs, declared in frontmatter (e.g. `["product/.pencil-brand.json"]`). Drives the build-order graph — distinct from `references` (which is "mentions /slug in prose"); `requires` is "needs this artifact".

slug.description: Slash-command form, e.g. `"core:tools:npm"`. Each colon-separated segment is lowercase kebab-case.

tags.description: Orthogonal discovery metadata. Two-tier: curated `core` tags (TAGS.md) plus free-form `extension` tags.

Frontmatter.description: Arbitrary YAML frontmatter from the source `.md` file. The schema intentionally does not lock this down without forking per-kind frontmatter contracts; treat unknown keys as forward-compatible.

ItemKind.description: Distinguishes runnable commands, multi-phase workflows, and context-only artifacts.

commandSlug.description: Underlying command slug for direct invocation.

estimatedDuration.description: Free-form duration estimate, e.g. `"2-4 hours"` or `"1 week"`.

outcome.description: Imperative action-phrase describing the workflow's outcome.

slug.description: Workflow slug within its domain, e.g. `"greenfield"`.
